[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000111 4
1 10011100 4
2 01100100 3
3 00111000 3
4 11100010 4
5 10110010 4
6 10111111 7
7 10101100 4

01 10 11110111 7
12 21 11110111 7
23 32 11001111 6
34 43 01011111 6
45 54 10111111 7 match 6
56 65 10111111 7 match 6
67 76 10101111 6
70 07 11110011 6

02 20 11010111 6
13 31 01111111 7
24 42 10010111 5
35 53 11111111 a
46 64 10111101 6
57 75 10111111 7 match 6
60 06 11111110 7
71 17 11110111 7

03 30 11011110 6
14 41 01110101 5
25 52 10111111 7 match 6
36 63 11101110 6
47 74 10110011 5
50 05 11111111 a
61 16 11111101 7
72 27 10100111 5

04 40 11010011 5
15 51 11111111 a
26 62 10101111 6
37 73 11101111 7
